falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting a potential reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above the 200-day moving average by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key trendline would invalidate the pattern similarity to a historical bottom, indicating a bullish trend rather than a hold.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the VIX drops below 12 and remains there
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A VIX level below 12 for 14 days would signal extreme complacency, refuting the 'HOLD' signal's implication of ongoing volatility or uncertainty.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
